summary: libSkiaSharp.so has an undefined symbol FT_Get_BDF_Property at runtime on Linux ARM64 and RISC-V64 because the bundled static FreeType build (BUILD.gn) omits ftbdf.c while TT_CONFIG_OPTION_BDF is enabled in ftoption.h, and the version script hides all non-sk_*/gr_* symbols preventing runtime resolution from system freetype.

bugSignals.errorMessage: symbol lookup error: libSkiaSharp.so: undefined symbol: FT_Get_BDF_Property

stepsToReproduce: Build a .NET application referencing SkiaSharp 3.119.0-preview.1.2 or 3.119.0
Deploy to Linux ARM64 or RISC-V64 (e.g., Raspberry Pi, QEMU riscv64)
Run the application — crashes immediately with symbol lookup error for FT_Get_BDF_Property
reproEvidence.environmentDetails: Reported on: RISC-V64 QEMU (AOSC OS), Raspberry Pi 3/4/5 (Debian Bookworm ARM64), various ARM64 Linux distros. System freetype versions 2.13-2.14. SkiaSharp 3.119.0-preview.1.2 and 3.119.0.

repoLinks.description: Reporter's application that triggers the crash
Downstream Jellyfin Docker issue for same symptom on Pi5
Downstream Uno Platform issue on RPi CM4

versionAnalysis.relevanceReason: The freetype2 BUILD.gn still does not include ftbdf.c. No PR has addressed this specific symbol. PR #3494 (merged) fixed a related but distinct fontconfig linking issue.

fixStatus.reason: ftbdf.c is still absent from externals/skia/third_party/freetype2/BUILD.gn sources list on the main branch. PR #3494 fixed fontconfig sysroot linking but not the missing BDF symbol.

analysis.summary: The bundled static FreeType build omits ftbdf.c from its sources in BUILD.gn, but the configuration header ftoption.h enables TT_CONFIG_OPTION_BDF. This causes code in the truetype/SFNT driver to reference FT_Get_BDF_Property, which is defined only in ftbdf.c. The resulting libSkiaSharp.so has an undefined symbol. On x64, the system freetype loaded by fontconfig may resolve it at runtime. On ARM64/RISC-V64, the symbol resolution fails — likely due to different dynamic linker behavior, older system freetype versions, or the version script (local: *) preventing resolution from external libraries.
analysis.rationale: This is clearly a native build bug — the library ships with an unresolved symbol. Multiple reporters across different ARM64 devices (RPi 3/4/5/CM4, Jellyfin Docker) and RISC-V64 confirm the issue. The community-discovered LD_PRELOAD workaround confirms the symbol exists in system freetype but isn't resolved by default. Labels are already correct.

keySignals.interpretation: FT_Get_BDF_Property is referenced but not defined in the statically-linked freetype within libSkiaSharp.so.

keySignals.text: it's not specific to riscv64. you will find the same issue with x86_64 etc. with same (new) version of fontconfig.
keySignals.interpretation: The symbol mismatch is architecture-independent but manifests more on arm64/riscv64 due to distro/freetype version differences.
Forcing system freetype to load resolves the missing symbol, confirming it's a build-time omission in the bundled freetype.

keySignals.text: I ran into both of these errors: uuid_generate_random and FT_Get_BDF_Property
keySignals.interpretation: Multiple undefined symbols suggest the native build has several missing dependencies for arm64.

codeInvestigation.finding: The sources list includes many freetype .c files but does NOT include '../externals/freetype/src/base/ftbdf.c' which defines FT_Get_BDF_Property.
TT_CONFIG_OPTION_BDF is #defined (enabled), causing the truetype/SFNT driver to compile code paths that call FT_Get_BDF_Property.
This file defines FT_Get_BDF_Property (FT_EXPORT_DEF) but is not compiled into the build.

Version script exports only sk_*/gr_*/skottie_*/sksg_*/skresources_* symbols. All freetype symbols (including FT_Get_BDF_Property) are marked local, preventing runtime resolution from system freetype.
skia_use_system_freetype2=false confirms freetype is statically linked from source, not using system library.

workarounds: Set LD_PRELOAD to system libfreetype: export LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so.6
Install system freetype and fontconfig packages: sudo apt-get install -y libuuid1 libfreetype6 libharfbuzz0b libfontconfig1
nextQuestions: Does adding ftbdf.c to BUILD.gn sources resolve the symbol without side effects?
Are there other missing freetype source files that could cause similar undefined symbols?
Should the uuid_generate_random issue (comment 17) be tracked separately or as part of this fix?

resolution.hypothesis: The freetype2 BUILD.gn is missing ftbdf.c from its sources list. Since TT_CONFIG_OPTION_BDF is enabled in ftoption.h, the compiled freetype code references FT_Get_BDF_Property but the function is never defined, leaving an unresolved symbol in libSkiaSharp.so.

proposals.title: Add ftbdf.c to freetype BUILD.gn
proposals.description: Add '../externals/freetype/src/base/ftbdf.c' to the sources array in externals/skia/third_party/freetype2/BUILD.gn to include the FT_Get_BDF_Property implementation in the static freetype build.

proposals.title: LD_PRELOAD system freetype workaround
proposals.description: Set LD_PRELOAD to force-load system freetype before libSkiaSharp.so. This allows the dynamic linker to resolve FT_Get_BDF_Property from the system library.

proposals.title: Disable TT_CONFIG_OPTION_BDF
proposals.description: Undefine TT_CONFIG_OPTION_BDF in ftoption.h to remove the dependency on FT_Get_BDF_Property entirely. This disables BDF table support in SFNT fonts but may be acceptable since BDF fonts are rarely used.

resolution.recommendedReason: Most correct fix — includes the missing source file so all BDF-related symbols are defined. Trivial one-line change in BUILD.gn with no expected side effects. The LD_PRELOAD workaround is confirmed working for immediate relief.

actionability.reason: Root cause is identified (missing ftbdf.c in BUILD.gn) with a clear fix path. Needs native rebuild and verification on ARM64/RISC-V64 to confirm.

actions.description: Labels are already correct — no changes needed
Post analysis with LD_PRELOAD workaround and root cause
actions.comment:
Thanks for the report. We've traced this to the bundled FreeType build — the source file `ftbdf.c` (which defines `FT_Get_BDF_Property`) is not included in the static FreeType compilation, even though BDF support is enabled in the configuration headers.

Here's a workaround you can use while we investigate a proper fix:

```bash
# Find your system freetype path
ldconfig -p | grep freetype

# Set LD_PRELOAD to load system freetype before libSkiaSharp.so
export LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so.6
dotnet run
```

For a systemd service, add to your `[Service]` section:
```ini
Environment=LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so.6
```

If you also hit `undefined symbol: uuid_generate_random`, install libuuid: `sudo apt-get install -y libuuid1`.

The fix on the SkiaSharp side would be adding the missing source file to the FreeType build configuration.

actions.description: Cross-reference with ARM64 undefined symbol issue
